sn2.25:1.0.1: Evaṁ me sutaṁ—​ekaṁ samayaṁ sambahulā bhikkhū, kosalesu vihāranti himavantapasse araññakuṭikāya uddhatā unnaḷā capalā mukharā vikiṇṇavācā muṭṭhassatino asampajānā asamāhitā vibbhantacittā pākatindriyā.
sn2.25:1.0.2: Atha kho jantu devaputto tadahuposathe pannarase yena te bhikkhū tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā te bhikkhū gāthāhi ajjhabhāsi:
